\tzpentry{ID11387}{CPL Breathing Equation of State}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
The CPL parameterization models the equation of state as w0 plus wa times one minus the scale factor.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
w(a)=w_{0}+w_{a}(1-a)
